name: nexus
description: Nexus — single-package AI engineering operating system for governed discovery, planning, build, review, QA, ship, and closeout.

scripts.build: bun run gen:skill-docs --host all; bun build --compile runtimes/browse/src/cli.ts --outfile runtimes/browse/dist/browse && bun build --compile runtimes/browse/src/find-browse.ts --outfile runtimes/browse/dist/find-browse && bun build --compile runtimes/design/src/cli.ts --outfile runtimes/design/dist/design && bun build --compile bin/nexus-global-discover.ts --outfile bin/nexus-global-discover && bash runtimes/browse/scripts/build-node-server.sh && git rev-parse HEAD > runtimes/browse/dist/.version && git rev-parse HEAD > runtimes/design/dist/.version && chmod +x runtimes/browse/dist/browse runtimes/browse/dist/find-browse runtimes/design/dist/design bin/nexus-global-discover bin/nexus-global-discover && rm -f .*.bun-build || true
scripts.test: bun test runtimes/browse/test/ test/ --ignore 'test/skill-e2e-*.test.ts' --ignore test/skill-llm-eval.test.ts --ignore test/skill-routing-e2e.test.ts --ignore test/codex-e2e.test.ts --ignore test/gemini-e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:evals: EVALS=1 bun test --retry 2 --concurrent --max-concurrency ${EVALS_CONCURRENCY:-15} test/skill-llm-eval.test.ts test/skill-e2e-*.test.ts test/skill-routing-e2e.test.ts test/codex-e2e.test.ts test/gemini-e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:evals:all: EVALS=1 EVALS_ALL=1 bun test --retry 2 --concurrent --max-concurrency ${EVALS_CONCURRENCY:-15} test/skill-llm-eval.test.ts test/skill-e2e-*.test.ts test/skill-routing-e2e.test.ts test/codex-e2e.test.ts test/gemini-e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e: EVALS=1 bun test --retry 2 --concurrent --max-concurrency ${EVALS_CONCURRENCY:-15} test/skill-e2e-*.test.ts test/skill-routing-e2e.test.ts test/codex-e2e.test.ts test/gemini-e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:all: EVALS=1 EVALS_ALL=1 bun test --retry 2 --concurrent --max-concurrency ${EVALS_CONCURRENCY:-15} test/skill-e2e-*.test.ts test/skill-routing-e2e.test.ts test/codex-e2e.test.ts test/gemini-e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:gate: EVALS=1 EVALS_TIER=gate bun test --retry 2 --concurrent --max-concurrency ${EVALS_CONCURRENCY:-15} test/skill-llm-eval.test.ts test/skill-e2e-*.test.ts test/skill-routing-e2e.test.ts test/codex-e2e.test.ts test/gemini-e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:periodic: EVALS=1 EVALS_TIER=periodic EVALS_ALL=1 bun test --retry 2 --concurrent --max-concurrency ${EVALS_CONCURRENCY:-15} test/skill-e2e-*.test.ts test/skill-routing-e2e.test.ts test/codex-e2e.test.ts test/gemini-e2e.test.ts
